page_metadata.biotools__summary: A tool especially designed to search for putative interactions between a H/ACA snoRNA stem and a list of target sequence. It implements a dynamic programming algorithm that computes thermodynamically optimal H/ACA-RNA interactions in an efficient scanning variant.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A tool especially designed to search for putative interactions between a H/ACA snoRNA stem and a list of target sequence. It implements a dynamic programming algorithm that computes thermodynamically optimal H/ACA-RNA interactions in an efficient scanning variant.
